creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
XEmacs Additional elisp packages ports has been ported. These ports were
made for xemacs-sumo* ports and users to use selective categories suite for
individual working :)

I put the port packed with tar czf and uuencode below "Fix:"

Packed tarball is :
-rw-r--r--  1 kiri  staff  14432 Jun  3 14:38 xemacspkgadd-1.0-000603.tar.gz
